spec_match.rationale: Illustrates dynamic TOC marking matching spec focus algorithms.

interactive.rationale: Generates the table of contents on the fly, wires smooth scrolling, and syncs active markers beautifully.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment explaining the death of IntersectionObserver.

edge_cases.rationale: Addresses viewport bottom alignment and fallback behaviors.

design_system.rationale: Matches active and neutral states cleanly.

summary: A great dynamic Table of Contents generator showing how TOC builders map anchors to scrollable DOM.
